sql.if: and (sp.id = #{goodsName} or pl.product_title like #{goodsName} or pl.id like #{goodsName} )

choose.when: and sp.is_delete = 0 and sp.is_show = 1 and m.is_open = 1 and st.is_delete = 0 and pl.status = 2 and pl.recycle = 0

mapper.select: select count(sp.id) from lkt_seconds_pro as sp LEFT JOIN lkt_seconds_time as st on sp.time_id = st.id and sp.store_id = st.store_id left join lkt_product_list as pl on pl.id = sp.pro_id and sp.store_id = pl.store_id left join lkt_configure stock on stock.id=sp.attr_id left join lkt_mch as m on m.id = pl.mch_id and sp.store_id = m.store_id

select sp.*, st.starttime, st.endtime, pl.initial, pl.product_title from lkt_seconds_pro as sp LEFT JOIN lkt_seconds_time as st on sp.time_id = st.id LEFT JOIN platform_activities as pa on pa.id = sp.platform_activities_id left join lkt_product_list as pl on pl.id = sp.pro_id where sp.store_id = #{store_id} and sp.store_id = st.store_id and ((sp.starttime <= #{date} and sp.endtime >= #{date} and sp.is_delete = 0) or (pa.starttime >= #{date} and pa.endtime >= #{date})) and st.starttime <= #{time} and st.endtime > #{time} and sp.is_show = 1 and sp.is_delete = 0 and st.is_delete = 0 and pl.status = 2 and pl.recycle = 0 order by sp.num desc
select count(distinct a.id) from lkt_seconds_activity a,lkt_seconds_label lab,lkt_product_list b,lkt_mch c,lkt_brand_class d,lkt_product_class e,lkt_seconds_pro pro
